overview.title: Agent Eval Extension
overview.description: Extend arc-evaluating from prompt-response eval to agent behavior eval. Add transcript-based behavioral assertions, mixed grading, environment control (--plugin-dir, --max-turns), and dashboard updates.

constraint.title: Zero External Dependencies
constraint.description: Node.js standard library only. No npm dependencies.

constraint.title: Backward Compatible
constraint.description: Existing scenarios, results JSONL, and grading must work unchanged. New fields are additive only.

constraint.title: Behavioral Grading Is Deterministic
constraint.description: Behavioral assertions use code grading only. No model calls for tool_called, tool_before, etc.

constraint.title: Skill Doc Out Of Scope
constraint.description: arc-evaluating/SKILL.md changes require arc-writing-skills TDD process. Not included in this implementation scope.
